heading: Purpose of sections 423 to 423g and 610
label: 423f Purpose of sections 423 to 423g and 610
text: The purpose of sections 423 to 423g and 610 of this title is the rehabilitation of the several reclamation projects and the insuring of their future success by placing them upon a sound operative and business basis, and the Secretary of the Interior is directed to administer said sections to those ends.
notes: References in TextSections 423 to 423g and 610 of this title, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , which enacted sections 423 to 423g and 610 of this title. has been omitted from the Code. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act of May 25, 1926, ch. 38344 Stat. 636Section 610 of this title
